name: Sesame Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into bite-sized cubes.
2. In a large bowl, combine the sour cream, lemon juice, celery salt, pepper, minced garlic, and sesame seeds with the bread crumbs. Mix well.
3. Coat the chicken pieces thoroughly and cover. Refrigerate overnight or for 8 hours.
4. Combine the remaining crumbs and sesame seeds in a shallow dish.
5. Lightly grease a baking sheet.
6. Roll each chicken piece in the crumb mixture, arranging them in a single layer on the baking sheet.
7. Pour melted butter over the top of the chicken.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes until golden brown.
9. Serve with honey mustard for dipping.
